name: threatAssessment
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.threats === undefined || output.result.threats.every(t => Number.isFinite(t.riskScore))
output.ok === false || output.result.threats === undefined || output.result.threats.every(t => Number.isFinite(t.likelihood) && Number.isFinite(t.impact))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data.threats[]. riskScore = round(likelihood × impact × 100); severity: >=60 critical, >=40 high, >=20 medium, else low; sorted desc by riskScore. Fail-closed: each threat's likelihood/impact goes through finiteNum (clamped 0..1, rejects NaN/Infinity); non-array threats → CTA message; non-object entries filtered. Result card renders threats[]{threat,category,likelihood,impact,riskScore,severity,mitigation} + critical/total/overallThreatLevel/topThreat EXACTLY.
